data.title: Chainalysis releases 2025 Global Cryptocurrency Adoption Index, with India, the United States, and Pakistan ranking in the top three
data.description: According to Cointelegraph, the 2025 Global Cryptocurrency Adoption Index released by Chainalysis shows that India, the United States and Pakistan rank in the top three, followed by Vietnam and Brazil.

data.title: Fed governor nominee Milan pledges to uphold central bank independence
data.description: The U.S. Senate Banking Committee will hold a hearing Thursday morning local time for Stephen Milan, Trump's nominee for the Federal Reserve Board. In his pre-submitted testimony, Milan stated, "In my view, the central bank's most important mission is to prevent depression and hyperinflation. The independence of monetary policy is a key element to its success." Milan stated, "If confirmed, I intend to faithfully carry out my duties in accordance with the mandate granted by Congress. My opinions and decisions will be based on macroeconomic analysis and judgment about what is best for long-term management. The Federal Open Market Committee is an independent body with a significant mandate, and I intend to maintain that independence and serve the American people to the best of my ability." However, Milan also raised questions about the Fed's oversight of activities outside of its dual mandate, including its balance sheet. "The Federal Reserve oversees the world's most important financial institutions," he stated. "It sets different prices for borrowers and lenders (including other central banks). The ultimate composition of the Fed's balance sheet is an open question." (Jinshi)

data.title: Businesses embrace Bitcoin amid 2025 bull market surge – River
data.description:
Businesses have become a driving force in Bitcoin’s 2025 bull market, with corporate holdings now accounting for more than 6% of its total supply, according to a new report from River Financial. The report found that in the first eight months of 2025 alone, business inflows into Bitcoin surpassed last year’s total by $12.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/businesses-embrace-bitcoin-amid-2025-bull-market-surge-river/
